author: @tomkuzik7
text: Really enjoy these vlogs brotha. Love seein you in your authentic element. So true about the perspective thing. Want another good book that goes hand in hand to that perspective is As a Man Thinketh...So is He. Don't chase ever brotha. Attract. Believe you already are the embodiment of what you want to become and the transformation happens slowly over time. There's no outside validation that's ever gonna tell you who you are only you have to know within yourself. This is life mastery techniques. Good shit more people need to teach themselves about. Keep expanding brotha, keep learning, keep growing. God bless brotha 🙏😤🙌🕊

author: @nothinghighandawful
text: I have a lightsaber choreo question that I'm pretty damn sure has never been asked before: Okay, so why, in Ep. II, do both Hayden and Sam hold their lightsabers left-handed (left hand on top), yet change to a right-handed grip (right hand on top) in Ep. III? I've always noticed and wondered, yet never seen it asked.

author: @keyseronthewire
text:
Good to see you/Nick hanging out again. From the behind the scenes of the films to your vlogs, he seems like a truly genuine kind soul and really down to Earth. It's rare to find that in someone these days, much less in the industry realm that he came from. At the end of the day, ya just gotta stay true to yourself and you'll never fall. God bless.

Also, even though it started as a logical baseline for the characters/fights, I've always loved the power level system... Obi-Wan and Mace a level 8, Anakin on fent a 9, and Yoda/Palpatine a 9 as well. It would be cool to see more of that footage and see y'all geek out over more topics and Nick's thoughts on more SW duels etc.
